---
date: 2025-06-13
category: FIFA治理
status: 已被质疑
title_zh: "2025世俱杯迈阿密国际参赛资格与“梅西红利”争议"
title_en: "2025 Club World Cup: Inter Miami's place and the 'Messi dividend' controversy"
summary_zh: "据报道，在2025年世俱杯开赛前后，围绕迈阿密国际以东道主协会代表身份参赛的资格问题出现持续争议。FIFA与迈阿密国际方面的公开口径是：球队以2024年MLS常规赛支持者盾（Supporters' Shield）冠军身份，作为东道主协会代表俱乐部入围；但多家媒体与评论员质疑，这一资格口径是否在事实上有利于拥有梅西的迈阿密国际，从而帮助FIFA为改制后的新赛事制造关注度与商业价值。相关讨论主要集中在赛事治理、公平性与标准透明度，而非已经形成官方纪律裁定。"
summary_en: "Around the 2025 Club World Cup, sustained debate emerged over Inter Miami's place as the host-member association representative. FIFA and Inter Miami's public explanation was that the club qualified as the 2024 MLS Supporters' Shield winner and host representative; however, multiple media outlets and commentators questioned whether the framework in practice advantaged Messi's Inter Miami and helped FIFA market its revamped tournament. The dispute was framed mainly as a governance, transparency and competitive-integrity debate rather than an official disciplinary case."
note_zh: "本条目记录的是围绕资格标准与赛事治理的公开质疑，不代表本站认定存在违规照顾或不当利益输送。"
note_en: "This entry records public questions about qualification standards and tournament governance; it does not assert that favoritism or improper benefit has been proven."
tags: [2025世俱杯, Messi, Inter Miami, FIFA, 资格争议, 治理, 迈阿密国际]
sources:
  - { label: "Reuters（Google News聚合页）- Club World Cup slot softens the blow of Miami defeat", url: "https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMimwFBVV95cUxNeEhodVdDT2RJM1JEdHJFUEdJNGVZS1paSnh0RjhIMXVCOTJGcnJ0VE5HOGx5VW5DbUlranh0eFN0UkI2a1ZEcXJUeTdRVmVSNTZQVmtodEtNcGtwbEFRSE9QLWJBb2s1ajM2dWVsQnBtVUQxOXU1WHlUaFNKWUxRRlA1UWFuSDUxN3RzdDJYMEEyTXQ0SmRVZVptNA?oc=5", type: 媒体 }
  - { label: "Inter Miami CF 官方公告（Google News聚合页）- FIFA Announces Inter Miami CF as Host Member Association Club for FIFA Club World Cup 2025", url: "https://news.google.?oc=5", type: 官方 }
  - { label: "Yahoo Sports（Google News聚合页）- 'Merit based' or Messi based? How Inter Miami became the Club World Cup's controversial opening act", url: "https://news.google.?oc=5", type: 媒体 }
  - { label: "The Independent（Google News聚合页）- The controversial reason Lionel Messi's Inter Miami are playing in the Club World Cup", url: "https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMinAFBVV95cUxNTU1DTEY5cDNHcnh5ZWViOTJfcTJKV3FVYTlkdG1KTDJZc2ZhcFpibnZMX0tSQVJRa3hVSHpnWmw4MFZZQ3ROdGFjaTBBYTVkajlGbG9SUE0zd1FyUnhySEIzbVNybl9ZMHAwRkgtR3pjNHY2SElMMlNiZC00OUJ5R2F6YjZ1RFNEV3BraVctajdZNTJZT3pNdnhMUzc?oc=5", type: 媒体 }
response:
  who: "FIFA / Inter Miami CF"
  text_zh: "官方口径强调，迈阿密国际是以2024年MLS Supporters' Shield冠军身份，作为东道主协会代表俱乐部参加2025世俱杯。"
  text_en: "The official position stated that Inter Miami entered the 2025 Club World Cup as the 2024 MLS Supporters' Shield winner and the host-member association club representative."
  source: { label: "Inter Miami CF 官方公告（Google News聚合页）- FIFA Announces Inter Miami CF as Host Member Association Club for FIFA Club World Cup 2025", url: "https://news.google.?oc=5", type: 官方 }
---
